PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 12/12/05 TO CHARLES O. GEERHART, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT, CSR#1694.

Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Relief from Sanctions issued on 12/12/05 to Charles O. Geerhart, Esq., in the amount of $350.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR#1694.
